scope: ST1~ST3 engine-core milestone only. This is not a full DCGO snapshot completion gate and not RL training approval.

gates.details: Target pool 'ST1-ST3' validates with 48 card records.
ST3-02 has variant-specific CardEffectClassName values; ST3-02#4977:P2 has CardEffectClassName ST3_02 but no source body.
EngineSession option/security/rules/phase/attack selection replay tests pass.
Option hand play moves through Executing to Trash and rollback tests pass.
Security multi-check, dynamic SecurityAttack, per-card cleanup, snapshot, replay tests pass.
Trigger stack frame, ordering, source revalidation, AfterEffects fingerprint tests pass.
Counter source collection, counter resolution, block, switch, OnEndAttack context tests pass.
ParityTrace and ParityFixtureComparer tests pass; missing Unity fixture reports NotRun, not Passed.

findings.details: ST3-02 base/P1 remain NoEffect candidates, but P2 has CardEffectClassName ST3_02 without source body. Do not guess implementation.
